notes:
Production correctness pass + Ling-2.6-flash runtime fully wired through vMLX scheduler.

New: Ling-2.6-flash / Bailing-V2.5 (`bailing_hybrid` model_type) loads in 8.9s and runs at 23-43 t/s through the standard vMLX scheduler with hybrid cache (5 KVCache MLA layers + 28 ArraysCache linear-attn layers + MoE routing). Five-fix chain: bailing_hybrid.make_cache drops the unused MTP cache slot (was crashing extract_cache); jang_tools P15 router patch skips Bailing-style Gate (returns tuple, not raw logits); jang_tools drops mx.softmax(precise=True) (mlx 0.31.3+ removed it inside mx.compile); capabilities.py and registry set think_in_template=False (Ling default is `detailed thinking off`); server.py skips the has_thinking heuristic when family is explicitly registered. Multi-turn coherence verified live (T1 thinking-off greet, T2 paged-cache recall, T3 thinking-on math 17+28=45).

Carried from 1.5.16: bundled mlx_lm fp32 SDPA absorb branch in deepseek_v3 / deepseek_v32 / mistral4 (controlled fork at panel/scripts/patches/, hard-failing the build if the patch source is missing); JANG_4K allocator no longer downgrades routed expert MLPs below the namesake bit width on 256+ expert MoE; MiniMax-M2.7-Small JANGTQ artifact alignment (pad_minimax_jangtq_experts pads 154→160 with -10000 dummy bias and inert TQ); paged + disk L2 cache verified live (1.74× speedup on warm-prefix); DSV4 fast-load via pre-stacked sidecar 15s warm vs 170s cold; Ollama gateway image translation + cache_salt/skip_prefix_cache passthrough + reasoning_content→thinking + tool-call argument JSON.parse; Anthropic Omni streaming via AnthropicStreamAdapter; Responses API suppressed-reasoning tool extraction; DSV4 SwitchGLU patch idempotent + sidecar runtime_patch fingerprint; VMLX_MODELS_DIR canonical env var.
